expectations.text: Queue table present with all categories (Overdue, Due Today, Never Reviewed, Upcoming, Mastered)
expectations.evidence: Output uses custom categories (Overdue/never reviewed, Reviewed at least once, Missing next_review, No review fields) instead of the skill's standard categories. No Upcoming/Mastered buckets.

expectations.text: Correct total count matches eligible wiki notes minus no-review exclusions
expectations.evidence: Reports 249 total but does not exclude no-review tagged notes. No awareness of the no-review opt-out mechanism.

expectations.text: Ready for Review list follows priority ordering: Overdue > Due Today > Never Reviewed
expectations.evidence: Lists all notes by days-overdue grouping, not by priority buckets. No 'Ready for Review' section.

expectations.text: Date-aware categorization: notes before today are Overdue, equal to today are Due Today
expectations.evidence: Correctly identifies notes due today (12) separately from overdue notes. Groups overdue by days overdue.

expectations.text: Output ends with asking user to choose full or quick mode
expectations.evidence: Output ends with observations and recommendations. No mode selection prompt — baseline has no awareness of full/quick review modes.

summary: Baseline correctly scans and categorizes by date but uses ad-hoc structure. No awareness of the review system's modes, no-review exclusion, or standard queue format.
